items.title: US Stocks Show Mixed Performance, S&P 500 and Nasdaq Nearing Record Highs
items.content: US stocks are mixed. S&P 500 up to 7,519.47, Nasdaq Composite also higher around 26,343.97-26,656.18, both nearing record highs. Tech stocks, particularly Micron Technology, are driving performance.

items.title: Hang Seng Index Down Slightly at 25,599.45, -0.03%
items.content: Hang Seng Index at 25,599.45 HKD, down -0.03%. Day range 25,483.24 to 25,732.36. 1-year change +9.95%.

items.title: China's Economy Undergoing Structural Transformation with 'New Quality Productive Forces'
items.content: Chinese economy transforming with 'new quality productive forces' (AI, green tech, high-end manufacturing) under 15th Five-Year Plan. Q1 2026 performance showed significant expansion. New US$10.7 billion canal nearing completion. Discussions with Putin on energy deal. Global sell-off of US Treasuries. Solar overcapacity concerns. Migrant workers' access to public services expanded. Population over 65 outnumbers children. Yuan at multi-year highs. China overtakes US in German investment. US chipmakers revenue growth in China. New laws boosting private economy. Xi Jinping's remarks on private economy. Demographic shift to talent dividend.

items.title: Geopolitical Landscape Impacting Oil, Gold, and Commodity Markets
items.content: Middle East conflict and Strait of Hormuz closure causing oil prices to surge (Brent >$100/barrel). Gold acting as safe-haven, predicted to rise 15-30%. Central bank gold purchases strong. Commodity markets volatile, energy prices up 24% in 2026. Fertilizer and food prices expected to rise. Base metals (copper, aluminum) to reach all-time highs due to energy transition demand. US-China dynamic and energy transition shaping markets.

items.title: Wall Street Reaches New Records, Global Shares Gain, Oil Volatility
items.content: Wall Street at new records, global shares gaining, U.S. market catching up. Oil prices volatile, some reports show sharp drop. 'Sell in May' myth outdated. Company headlines: Digital Turbine revenue projections, Lockheed Martin F-35 order, Vestand Nasdaq delisting, SOLAI NYSE non-compliance. Retail/travel: Ferrari shares fall after EV launch, airlines filing bankruptcy, retail chains closing. Personal finance: Mortgage rates rising, Southern cities lead in job market for grads, electricity prices high for years.
